component.name: PosterItem
component.script:
sub init() m.poster = m.top.findNode("poster") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.year = m.top.findNode("year") m.badge = m.top.findNode("badge") m.rating = m.top.findNode("rating") m.frame = m.top.findNode("frame") m.progressTrack = m.top.findNode("progressTrack") m.progressBar = m.top.findNode("progressBar") m.favStarBg = m.top.findNode("favStarBg") m.favStar = m.top.findNode("favStar") m.boundContent = invalid end sub
sub onContent() ' RowList recycles PosterItem instances across cells, so the ' previous content's favBump observer must be released before ' we attach to the new one - otherwise an unrelated toggle ' elsewhere triggers a refresh on this (now-different) cell. if m.boundContent <> invalid then m.boundContent.unobserveField("favBump") end if c = m.top.itemContent m.boundContent = c if c = invalid then m.favStarBg.visible = false m.favStar.visible = false return end if m.poster.uri = c.HDPosterUrl m.title.text = c.title m.year.text = c.shortDescriptionLine2 if c.shortDescriptionLine1 <> invalid and c.shortDescriptionLine1 <> "" then m.rating.text = "* " + c.shortDescriptionLine1 m.rating.visible = true else m.rating.visible = false end if if c.releaseDate <> invalid and c.releaseDate <> "" then m.badge.text = c.releaseDate m.badge.visible = true else m.badge.visible = false end if ' Resume bar - upstream views set pctWatched (0..100) via ' U_SetCellPct on cells where the user has progress to show. ' Anything <=0 or >=100 hides the bar so finished/unstarted ' titles look like a normal poster. Custom field instead of ' Roku's built-in `percentageWatched` (which doesn't exist ' on plain ContentNode and silently rejects writes). pct = 0 if c.hasField("pctWatched") and c.pctWatched <> invalid then pct = c.pctWatched end if if pct > 0 and pct < 100 then m.progressTrack.visible = true m.progressBar.visible = true w = Int((pct * 220) / 100) if w < 4 then w = 4 m.progressBar.width = w else m.progressTrack.visible = false m.progressBar.visible = false end if ' Favorite indicator. Parent views toggle the favorite via ' Watchlist and bump c.favBump (added on demand) to force a ' live refresh; without that field changing this same code ' just runs on first content bind. refreshFavoriteIndicator() if not c.hasField("favBump") then c.addField("favBump", "integer", true) end if c.observeField("favBump", "onFavBumpChanged") end sub
sub onFavBumpChanged() refreshFavoriteIndicator() end sub
sub refreshFavoriteIndicator() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then m.favStarBg.visible = false m.favStar.visible = false return end if href = "" if c.url <> invalid then href = c.url isFav = false if href <> "" then isFav = W_IsFavorite("", href) m.favStarBg.visible = isFav m.favStar.visible = isFav end sub
sub onFocus() f = m.top.focusPercent if f >= 0.5 then m.frame.color = "0xff2424ff" m.title.color = "0xffffffff" else m.frame.color = "0x00000000" m.title.color = "0xc8c8c8ff" end if end sub
